meaning: adj.未确诊的,尚未找出原因的
examples: It is probable that many undiagnosed children exist in the education system with "invisible" disabilities.
And in most cases, the disease is undiagnosed.
The coroner, Dr Shirley Radcliffe, said it was likely she had an undiagnosed congenital heart problem.
John Moore-Robinson, 20, from Leicestershire, died in 2006 after being discharged with an undiagnosed ruptured spleen.
